name: cfcf
description: Cerefox Code Factory (cf²) -- deterministic orchestration harness for AI coding agents

scripts.test: bun test packages/core && bun test packages/server && bun test packages/cli && bun test packages/web
scripts.build:web: cd packages/web && bun run build && cd ../.. && bun run scripts/embed-web-dist.ts
scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun build packages/cli/src/index.ts --compile --external @huggingface/transformers --external onnxruntime-node --external sharp --outfile cfcf-binary
